company.name: Praxis Precision Medicines
company.subtitle: 2 NDAs filed (ulixacaltamide ET + relutrigine DEEs) · PDUFA Sep 2026 · Best-in-class CNS pipeline

market.notes: ~7M US patients with ET, most undertreated. No new pharmacological treatment in decades (only propranolol/primidone, both off-label). Essential3 Phase 3 positive. NDA filed early 2026. PDUFA Sep 27, 2026. BTD granted. Oral, selective T-type calcium channel inhibitor — novel mechanism. Pre-launch activities underway.
Ultra-rare severe pediatric epilepsies. EMBOLD registrational data strong. NDA filed early 2026. BTD + Orphan. First precision therapy for SCN2A/SCN8A DEEs. High-pricing orphan ($200-400K/yr).

~3.5M US epilepsy patients. Most potent NaV modulator ever developed. RADIANT Phase 2 presented at AES 2025 — best-in-disease profile. Phase 3 ongoing. Once-daily oral. Competitors: lacosamide, brivaracetam, cenobamate.

77% placebo-adjusted seizure reduction (p=0.015) in Phase 2. 71% achieved >50% seizure reduction. Solidus ASO platform (collaboration with Ionis). FDA aligned on simplified registrational path. EMBRAVE3 Phase 3 ongoing.
Expanding Solidus and Cerebrum platforms across rare genetic epilepsies. Multiple preclinical programs targeting distinct genetic drivers. Each is an orphan opportunity.

mega_bear.narrative: FDA rejects both NDAs — safety or efficacy concerns derail ET + DEE launches
events: ✗ Ulixacaltamide CRL — FDA requests additional safety data
✗ Relutrigine CRL — single-arm EMBOLD data insufficient
✗ Vormatrigine Phase 3 fails to differentiate from SOC in FOS
→ $8B market cap collapses to $1.5B cash floor (~$55/share)

bear.narrative: ET approved but slow uptake + DEE narrow label + vormatrigine crowded
events: ✓ Ulixacaltamide approved but physicians slow to adopt new mechanism
~ Relutrigine approved but very narrow DEE population limits revenue
✗ Vormatrigine Phase 3 positive but incremental vs cenobamate
→ Revenue ramp disappoints, market questions $8B valuation

base.narrative: Dual launch ET + DEE + vormatrigine best-in-class potential confirmed
events: ✓ Ulixacaltamide approved Sep 2026 — strong launch in underserved ET market
✓ Relutrigine approved — first precision therapy for DEEs
✓ Vormatrigine Phase 3 best-in-class data — NDA track
~ Elsunersen Phase 3 on track — platform expanding

bull.narrative: CNS franchise leader — ET blockbuster + DEE dominant + epilepsy platform
events: ✓ Ulixacaltamide blockbuster — $2B+ peak in ET (massive unmet need)
✓ Relutrigine expands to broader DEEs beyond SCN2A/8A
✓ Vormatrigine best-in-class epilepsy drug — replaces lacosamide/cenobamate
✓ Elsunersen + preclinical programs build rare epilepsy franchise

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Precision neuroscience platform — 5+ products, $10B+ revenue — J&J/Roche acquires at $600+
events: ✓ Ulixacaltamide $3B+ peak — redefines ET treatment globally
✓ Relutrigine + elsunersen dominate genetic epilepsies
✓ Vormatrigine replaces all first-gen NaV modulators in adult epilepsy
✓ Platform generates 5+ approved products — J&J or Roche acquires at $600+

lastData.title: Two NDAs filed + elsunersen Phase 2 positive
points: Relutrigine NDA filed — SCN2A/SCN8A DEEs (BTD + Orphan)
Vormatrigine RADIANT Phase 2: best-in-disease at AES 2025
Pre-launch activities underway for both ulixacaltamide and relutrigine
Hired Dr. Orrin Devinsky (global epilepsy leader) as Head of Clinical Strategy

nextCatalyst.title: Ulixacaltamide PDUFA — first new ET pharmacotherapy in decades
thresholds: If approved: immediate commercial launch (pre-launch underway)

risks: $8.2B market cap for pre-revenue company — high expectations baked in
ET market has no precedent for pharmacological blockbuster — adoption uncertain
Relutrigine NDA based on single-arm EMBOLD — regulatory risk higher than RCT
Vormatrigine faces cenobamate (SK Biosciences) which is already gaining share
Stock went from $30 to $310 in 12 months — 10x with zero revenue
Heavy cash burn (~$300M/yr) despite $1.55B war chest
CNS commercial execution is historically difficult for biotech
Short seller report challenged Essential3 data integrity
